title: Right, Left, Center for text columns
excerpt: Need to Right justify text columns, center does not make sense for 2-3 sentences

posts.author: PNM (A)
posts.cookedHtml: Need to Right justify text columns, center does not make sense for 2-3 sentences

posts.author: Cilla (Cilla Namfua)
posts.cookedHtml: Right click on column. Scroll down to change column type. Select “long text” and your text will align.
